    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    G

    gasPrice - Variable in class model.GasStation
     
    GasStation - Class in model
    Represents a Gas Station location with specific properties such as gas prices.
    GasStation - Enum constant in enum class enums.LocationType
    A gas station with specific gas prices.
    GasStation(String, LocationType, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class model.GasStation
    Constructs a new Gas Station instance.
    getCoordX() - Method in class model.Location
    Retrieves the X coordinate.
    getCoordY() - Method in class model.Location
    Retrieves the Y coordinate.
    getFirstLocation() - Method in class model.Route
    Retrieves the starting location of the route.
    getGasPrice() - Method in class model.GasStation
    Retrieves the current price of gas.
    getId() - Method in class model.Location
    Retrieves the unique identifier of the location.
    getLength() - Method in class model.Road
    Retrieves the physical length of the road.
    getLocations() - Method in class model.Problem
    Retrieves an unmodifiable view of the locations registered in the problem.
    getLocationType() - Method in class model.Location
    Retrieves the type classification of the location.
    getName() - Method in class model.Location
    Retrieves the name of the location.
    getNumberOfTerminals() - Method in class model.Airport
    Retrieves the number of terminals at the airport.
    getPopulation() - Method in class model.City
    Retrieves the city's population.
    getRoad() - Method in class model.Route
    Retrieves the road entity associated with this route.
    getRoadType() - Method in class model.Road
    Retrieves the type classification of the road.
    getRoutes() - Method in class model.Problem
    Retrieves an unmodifiable view of the routes registered in the problem.
    getSecondLocation() - Method in class model.Route
    Retrieves the destination location of the route.
    getSpeedLimit() - Method in class model.Road
    Retrieves the speed limit of the road.
